programmes.show_description: (2018) Visually stunning, award-winning drama. Can a musical director and a singer's mutual love triumph over conflicting loyalties across the Iron Curtain? In Polish/subs. Sexual scenes.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
(1954) Judy Holliday stars in this comedy as a smalltown girl who comes to New York and rents a billboard to publicise her name - and soon she's a TV star. With Jack Lemmon.
(1953) Drama starring Jeffrey Hunter as a Canadian serving in the WWII Royal Navy who is captured by the German raider that sunk his ship but escapes and seeks revenge.
(1951) Second World War drama. Richard Widmark stars as a commanding officer leading US Marines into the Pacific to capture Japanese prisoners and discover the location of a rocket base.
(1941) American frontier pioneering western starring Randolph Scott, Robert Young and Dean Jagger as three very different men working to connect east and west by telegraph in the 1860s.
(2019) Adventure comedy sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart and Karen Gillan. The old school pals enter the Jumanji video game again to save their friend.
(2022) Romcom with Julia Roberts and George Clooney. A staggeringly beautiful, divorced couple reunite to stop their daughter's wedding in the staggeringly beautiful surroundings of Bali.
(2011) Romcom. Justin Timberlake and Mila Kunis star as friends who aren't fans of romance. But they do like sex. Can they really sleep together but avoid all that emotion?
(2010) Action-thriller starring Angelina Jolie. A CIA agent goes on the run after a Russian defector claims that she's a sleeper agent who's about to commit a terrible act of terrorism.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
(1951) Western starring Van Heflin. During the uprising of the Sioux nation, a cunning scout attempts to save the 7th Cavalry after an officer orders the brutal massacre of Sioux innocents.
(1958) Brooding western starring Joan Collins and Gregory Peck. A man hunts down the four escaped prisoners who he believes are responsible for the murder of his wife.
(1958) Western. Van Heflin stars as a veteran frontiersman whose determination to mould his sons in his gun-totin' image backfires disastrously. With Tab Hunter and James Darren.
(1964) Romcom starring Rock Hudson and Doris Day. Thinking he has just a few months to live, a man makes his wife suspect he's having an affair when he tries to find her a new partner.
(1999) Hugh Grant and Julia Roberts star in the BAFTA-winning comedy romance about a bookshop owner who manages to get a glamorous movie star to go out with him. With Rhys Ifans.
(2018) Action crime thriller sequel. Denzel Washington returns as Robert McCall, who's out for revenge after ruthless killers murder an agency contact who he also considered a friend.
(2020) Oscar-winning drama with Anthony Hopkins and Olivia Colman. A man living with dementia struggles to piece reality together as he fights to keep his independence in his beloved home.
